hintDisplay: Sujeto: nosotros / Verbo: haber (auxiliar para condicional perfecto) / Verbo: monitorear / Complemento: el desempeño del sistema / Complemento: más de cerca / Complemento: durante el desarrollo / Verbo: estar (auxiliar progresivo) / Verbo: experimentar / Complemento: menos errores / Complemento: en producción / Tiempo: ahora
spanishSentence: Si hubiéramos monitoreado el desempeño del sistema más de cerca durante el desarrollo, estaríamos experimentando menos errores en producción ahora.
correctSentence: If we had monitored the system performance more closely during development, we would be experiencing fewer bugs in production now.

correctSentence: If the developer had optimized the code earlier, the application would be running faster now.

correctSentence: If the DevOps engineer hadn't failed to monitor the system logs yesterday, the production server wouldn't be down right now.
